hero.headline: See What You Cannot See
hero.subheadline: PRISM reveals the invisible dimensions of your projects—culture, politics, consciousness—so you can navigate complexity with wisdom.

feature1.title: Multi-Dimensional Intelligence
feature1.description: Go beyond tasks and timelines. See your project's culture, politics, and human dynamics.

feature2.title: AI-Powered Insights
feature2.description: Discover blind spots systematically. AI analyzes your project and reveals what you're missing.

feature3.title: Theory-Driven Visualizations
feature3.description: Evidence-based approach combining organizational theory with adaptive visual intelligence.

step1.title: Characterize Your Project
step1.description: Quick assessment of your project's complexity, culture, and dynamics

step2.title: Upload Documents
step2.description: Optional: Let AI analyze your project documents for deeper insights

step3.title: Discover Blind Spots
step3.description: Get visualizations and AI-powered insights revealing hidden patterns

cta.ready: Ready to see your project's full reality?

footer.tagline: Revealing the invisible dimensions of projects

delete.title: Delete Project

create.title: Create New Project

create.multilingualNote: Both English and Danish names will be used based on user language preference

validation.nameMax: Project name must be less than 100 characters
validation.descriptionMax: Description must be less than 500 characters
validation.teamSizeMin: Team size must be at least 1
validation.teamSizeMax: Team size must be less than 10000
validation.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
validation.atLeastOneName: At least one language name is required

projects.nameHelper: Fill in at least one language. The other will be copied automatically if left empty.

documents.title: Documents
documents.uploadDescription: Upload project documents for AI analysis (PDF, Word, Excel, etc.)
documents.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or click to select
documents.supported: Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, MD
documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
documents.description: Upload project documents for AI analysis
documents.pasteAreaPlaceholder:
Copy and paste your text here...

You can paste meeting notes, project descriptions, emails, or other relevant text.
documents.supportedFormats: Supported: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, MD

morphology.title: Morphological Assessment
morphology.subtitle: Characterize your project across 12 key dimensions
morphology.aiSuggestionsLoaded: AI suggestions loaded from your documents
morphology.regenerateDNADescSingle: This will regenerate the DNA code for this project based on its morphology data. The DNA code will be updated to use the correct dimension order.
morphology.regenerateDNADescAll: This will regenerate DNA codes for ALL your projects based on their morphology data. This ensures all DNA codes use the correct dimension order.
morphology.regenerateSkipped: All DNA codes are already correct

scoring.title: Morphology-Based Theory U Scoring
scoring.description: Deterministic mapping from your 12 morphological dimensions to Theory U phases
scoring.allPhasesDescription: How each Theory U phase scores based on your morphology
scoring.visitTheoryU: Visit the Theory U visualization tab to generate this analysis

complexity.title: Complexity Level
complexity.description: How predictable and ordered is your project environment?

options.simple: Simple - Clear cause-effect, best practices work
options.complicated: Complicated - Expert analysis needed, good practices
options.chaotic: Chaotic - No clear patterns, rapid action needed

stakeholder.title: Stakeholder Dynamics
stakeholder.description: What's the nature of stakeholder relationships?

knowledge.title: Knowledge Intensity
knowledge.description: What type of knowledge work dominates?

options.adaptive: Adaptive - Contextual adjustment of known methods

cultural.title: Cultural Context
cultural.description: What's the cultural span of the project?

temporal.title: Temporal Dynamics
temporal.description: What's the time horizon and rhythm?

challenge.title: Primary Challenge
challenge.description: What's the dominant type of challenge?

development.title: Inner Development Needs
development.description: Which inner development dimension is most critical?

options.scarce: Scarce - Severe limitations, creative solutions essential

change.title: Change Intensity
change.description: What's the magnitude of change involved?

options.transitional: Transitional - Planned replacement of current state

information.title: Information Flow
information.description: How does information move in the project?

options.hierarchical: Hierarchical - Chain of command, formal channels

blob.title: Morphology Blob
blob.description: A living, generative form that visualizes your project's 'energy'. Color, shape, movement, and patterns reflect the 12 morphological dimensions. See how the project 'breathes' and evolves.
blob.noData: No morphology data available. Please complete the project assessment first.
blob.archetypeExplainer: This archetype helps you quickly identify the project's 'personality' and typical challenges.

guide.colorDesc: Reflects organizational maturity (red/amber/orange/green/teal) and cultural diversity
guide.shapeDesc: Roughness = complexity, number of 'arms' = stakeholders, symmetry = information flow
guide.pulseDesc: Speed reflects project tempo (sprint = fast, transformation = slow)
guide.rotationDesc: Movement shows change intensity (disruptive = fast rotation)
guide.glowDesc: Inner (yellow) = development focus, outer (colored) = risk level
guide.layersDesc: All elements are drawn as layers on top of each other to create depth and show complexity

blob.layersExplainer: The visualization is built in layers from background to foreground

layerOrder.title: Visualization Layers (background → foreground)
layerOrder.note: Layers are drawn on top of each other – this is intentional, not a bug!

riskGuide.title: 🎨 Risk Colors
riskGuide.layeredNote: Note: The perceived color is a blend of base color (organizational) and overlay layers (cultural + risk)

blob.glowTooltip: This color appears as the outer glow on the visualization

outerGlow.title: Outer Glow - Risk Zone
outerGlow.description: Shows project risk level through color and intensity

mainShape.title: Main Shape - Project DNA
mainShape.description: Shape and contour reflect complexity and stakeholders

culturalOverlay.title: Cultural Layer - Organizational Context
culturalOverlay.description: Color gradients show cultural diversity and maturity

innerPattern.title: Inner Pattern - Knowledge Type
innerPattern.description: Pattern reflects the project's knowledge intensity

coreGlow.title: Core - Development Focus
coreGlow.description: The golden core shows focus on inner development

seed.name: The Seed
seed.description: Healthy beginner project with clear focus

bodyScan.title: Project Body Scan
bodyScan.description: Visual health check of your project's vital signs
bodyScan.basedOnMorphologyOnly: Based on morphology only (upload documents for deeper analysis)

head.simple: Clear strategic direction with straightforward goals
head.chaotic: High uncertainty, rapid changes, unclear causality

face.unified: Strong alignment and cooperation among stakeholders
face.cooperative: Generally positive collaboration with minor tensions

shoulders.scarce: Critical resource shortage requiring immediate action

spine.centralized: Single point of control and decision-making
spine.hierarchical: Multi-level structure with clear reporting lines

uJourney.title: Theory U Journey Timeline
uJourney.description: Visualization of the project's consciousness journey through Theory U phases

theoryU.title: Theory U Action Dashboard
theoryU.description: In-depth analysis of your Theory U position with concrete action recommendations
theoryU.errorDescription: An error occurred while analyzing the project. Please try again.
theoryU.noMorphologyEvidence: Morphology evidence will appear here once analysis is complete. Click refresh to regenerate.
theoryU.quoteRejectedDesc: The quote has been removed from evidence
theoryU.quotesRegeneratedDesc: New relevant quotes have been generated from your documents
theoryU.regenerateFailed: Failed to regenerate quotes. Please try again.
theoryU.addedToFavoritesDesc: Quote saved to your favorites collection
theoryU.favoriteFailed: Failed to save favorite. Please try again.

evidence.title: IDG Evidence Breakdown
evidence.description: See how morphological dimensions contribute to each IDG score

reasoning.developmentBoost: {{dimension}} receives +30 because it's your primary development focus
reasoning.organizationalGreen: {{dimension}} receives +15 because Green/Teal organizations emphasize collective decision-making and relationships
reasoning.organizationalOrange: {{dimension}} receives +15 because Orange organizations emphasize rational analysis and achievement
reasoning.organizationalRedAmber: {{dimension}} receives +15 because Red/Amber organizations emphasize immediate action and control
reasoning.challengeCognitive: {{dimension}} receives +10 because your project faces cognitive challenges requiring analytical reasoning
reasoning.challengeSocial: {{dimension}} receives +10 because your project faces social challenges requiring interpersonal skills
reasoning.challengeAdaptive: {{dimension}} receives +10 because your project requires adaptive capacity and self-awareness

recommendations.description: Actionable recommendations to improve project success

aiChat.contextAware: I'm aware of what page you're on and can provide context-specific guidance.
